subject: USCIS Notice of Action - Receipt Notice
body:
Receipt Number: MSC2690000001
Case Type: I-765 Application for Employment Authorization
Received Date: February 28, 2026

We have received your Form I-765. Your current EAD expires on April 15, 2026. We will mail your new EAD card once approved.

subject: Case Status Update - I-485 Case Transferred
body:
Receipt Number: SRC2100000001
Case Type: I-485 Application to Register Permanent Residence
Status: Case Was Transferred And Is Now At A New Office

Your Form I-485 was transferred to the Chicago Field Office. Priority date: January 2022.

subject: USCIS Appointment Scheduled - Biometrics Notice
body:
Application Support Center Appointment
Date: March 25, 2026 at 10:30 AM
Location: Chicago ASC, 101 W Ida B Wells Drive, Chicago IL 60605

Your biometrics appointment is required for your I-485 application.

subject: H-1B Transfer Approval Notice - Validity Period October 2028
body:
USCIS has approved the H-1B transfer petition.

Approval Details:
Receipt Number: WAC2190000001
Validity Period: March 10, 2026 - October 1, 2028

H-1B approved. You may begin employment with New Employer Inc. immediately.

subject: Passport Renewal Reminder - Expires January 2027
body:
Your passport is scheduled to expire on January 15, 2027. Many countries require at least 6 months validity for entry.

Expedited processing: 7-9 weeks (additional fee). Renew now to avoid travel disruption.
